Primary Purpose: Cold-start welcome surface shown before authentication.
Main Content: Hero illustration, brand intro, value props, Get Started / Sign In CTAs.
Key Actions: Tap Get Started, tap Sign In.
Navigation/Dependencies: Both CTAs route to login.
Data and State: No state.
Implementation Notes: New entry point — replaces direct-to-login cold start.

Primary Purpose: Authenticates the user into the prototype.
Main Content: PicklePlay branding, email field, password field, visibility toggle, submit button, social login buttons.
Key Actions: Sign in, toggle password visibility, choose social login placeholder.
Navigation/Dependencies: Reached from Landing. Calls onLoginSuccess; App.tsx handles onboarding/home route selection.
Data and State: Local form submit only.
Implementation Notes: No API call, validation service, or persisted token is wired.

Primary Purpose: Collects initial player context before showing the main app.
Main Content: Three steps: welcome, play location, skill level.
Key Actions: Continue, select skill, skip for now, complete.
Navigation/Dependencies: onComplete sets onboarding done and routes to Home.
Data and State: Local step and skill state.
Implementation Notes: Useful future fields: home location, skill level, onboarding completed flag.

Primary Purpose: Provides the default player dashboard.
Main Content: Greeting, quick actions, featured game, discover game cards, streak/progress prompt.
Key Actions: Open nearby courts, view games, browse clubs, create a game, open game details.
Navigation/Dependencies: Uses onNavigate for all downstream flows.
Data and State: Static quickActions and demoGames.
Implementation Notes: First tab screen after onboarding or returning login users.

Primary Purpose: Lets users browse local courts and nearby game opportunities.
Main Content: Courts/games segmented tabs, filter chips, list/map toggle, court list, Leaflet map, missing-court CTA.
Key Actions: Toggle court/game tab, open NearbyFilterSheet, switch view mode, locate user, open court details.
Navigation/Dependencies: Depends on Leaflet and React Leaflet; opens NearbyFilterSheet (bottom sheet); routes to court-details and games.
Data and State: Static demoCourts; local activeTab and viewMode.
Implementation Notes: Austin coordinates are used as demo center.

Primary Purpose: Lists games grouped by user relationship and schedule.
Main Content: My Games, Upcoming, Completed segmented control, date chips, game rows.
Key Actions: Change segment, select date chip, open GameFilterSheet, open game detail.
Navigation/Dependencies: Opens GameFilterSheet (bottom sheet); routes to game-details.
Data and State: Static myGames, upcomingGames, completedGames; local active tab/date.
Implementation Notes: Date chip selection is visual state and does not currently filter data.

Primary Purpose: Shows clubs the user belongs to and clubs to discover.
Main Content: My Clubs section, featured Kitchen Kings card, nearby club cards, create-club callout.
Key Actions: Open club details, join club, explore, create club.
Navigation/Dependencies: Routes to club-details and create-club.
Data and State: Static myClubs and discoverClubs.
Implementation Notes: Join buttons are presentational.

Primary Purpose: Shows the current player's account and play summary.
Main Content: Avatar, name, location, skill badge, stat cards, settings rows, logout button.
Key Actions: Edit profile, open settings/notifications, logout.
Navigation/Dependencies: Routes to edit-profile, settings, and notifications; logout returns to Landing.
Data and State: Static player profile and local navigation.
Implementation Notes: Useful account hub for future API-backed preferences.

Primary Purpose: Provides full context for one play session.
Main Content: Title, date/time, skill, players, organizer, court card, description, player avatars, chat.
Key Actions: Join/leave, invite players, open court, send chat placeholder.
Navigation/Dependencies: Routes to invite-players and court-details.
Data and State: Static detail; local joined state.
Implementation Notes: Receives optional gameId prop but does not fetch by ID.

Primary Purpose: Provides venue details and related games.
Main Content: Court hero, favorite button, address/rating, actions, amenities, games this week (GameRow).
Key Actions: Open directions, view games, share, favorite placeholder, open game detail.
Navigation/Dependencies: Opens external Google Maps placeholder; routes to games and game-details.
Data and State: Static court detail.
Implementation Notes: Receives optional courtId prop but does not fetch by ID.

Primary Purpose: Presents club profile, membership content, and lightweight chat.
Main Content: Club hero, join/share buttons, About, Rules, Events, Members, Chat tabs.
Key Actions: Switch tab, join club, share, type chat message placeholder.
Navigation/Dependencies: Internal tab state; no external data dependency.
Data and State: Static club details, member list, and messages.
Implementation Notes: Receives props but currently ignores them.

Primary Purpose: Lets users create a new scheduled game.
Main Content: Form fields for title, court, date/time, skill range (FormTierPicker), player limit, visibility, description.
Key Actions: Submit, view created game, invite players.
Navigation/Dependencies: Success routes to game-details or invite-players with placeholder ID.
Data and State: Local form and success state via useForm.
Implementation Notes: No validation or backend mutation beyond normal HTML field behavior.

Primary Purpose: Lets users create a new pickleball club.
Main Content: Multi-step club form with name, description, visibility, skill range, rules, and success screen.
Key Actions: Continue, back, create club, view club.
Navigation/Dependencies: Success routes to club-details or back.
Data and State: Local form, step, visibility, and success state.
Implementation Notes: Good candidate for backend create-club endpoint integration.

Primary Purpose: Allows user profile editing.
Main Content: Avatar edit affordance, name, bio, city, skill level (FormTierPicker).
Key Actions: Save changes, change avatar placeholder.
Navigation/Dependencies: Save calls back navigation.
Data and State: Local form state.
Implementation Notes: No persistence; values reset on remount.

Primary Purpose: Groups account-level controls and support links.
Main Content: Account, Privacy, Notifications, Support sections with row actions.
Key Actions: Open setting rows, logout.
Navigation/Dependencies: Row actions call onNavigate(item.id); logout returns to Landing.
Data and State: Static settings section definitions.
Implementation Notes: Some setting IDs may not map to implemented screens yet.

Primary Purpose: Provides full-screen search across app entities.
Main Content: Search input, recent searches, categorized results for courts/games/clubs/players.
Key Actions: Type search, clear, select recent term, open result, cancel.
Navigation/Dependencies: Result selection routes to detail pages based on result type.
Data and State: Static result catalog and query state.
Implementation Notes: No debounce or API search layer.

Primary Purpose: Lets organizers invite people to a game.
Main Content: Share link block, suggested player list, selected state, success confirmation.
Key Actions: Select players, cancel, send invites, return to game.
Navigation/Dependencies: Success routes to game-details with placeholder ID.
Data and State: Static suggested players and local selected set.
Implementation Notes: Receives optional gameId prop but does not load game details.

Primary Purpose: Displays user activity and reminders.
Main Content: Notification cards with type icon, title, body, timestamp, read/unread state.
Key Actions: Mark all read, open notification target, go back.
Navigation/Dependencies: Click behavior can navigate to related detail screens.
Data and State: Static initialNotifications; local read state.
Implementation Notes: Good future integration point for push notifications.

Primary Purpose: Captured user preferences for court discovery.
Main Content: Court type, access, number of courts, surface, amenities, reset/apply controls.
Key Actions: Reset placeholder, apply filters.
Navigation/Dependencies: Apply called onBack.
Data and State: No selected filter state beyond static selected styling.
Implementation Notes: Filter UI is now a bottom sheet — see src/components/filters/NearbyFilterSheet.tsx.

Primary Purpose: Captured user preferences for game discovery.
Main Content: Skill level, game type, day, time of day, distance, reset/apply controls.
Key Actions: Reset placeholder, apply filters.
Navigation/Dependencies: Apply called onBack.
Data and State: No selected filter state beyond static selected styling.
Implementation Notes: Filter UI is now a bottom sheet — see src/components/filters/GameFilterSheet.tsx.
